name: Sahara Gold and Silver Buyers
description_short: Family-owned precious metals buyer in Las Vegas specializing in gold, silver, jewelry, and coins with cash-on-the-spot transactions.
description_long:
Sahara Gold and Silver Buyers is a family-owned business located at 1300 E Sahara Ave in Las Vegas, operated by a father-and-son team. The business has built its reputation over years of experience in the precious metals industry, positioning itself as a trusted local resource for individuals looking to liquidate or acquire valuable items. The store maintains a professional, welcoming environment with organized displays and good lighting designed to showcase product quality and put customers at ease during transactions.

The company offers a comprehensive range of services centered on the buying and selling of precious metals and collectibles. Customers can sell gold, silver, and jewelry for immediate cash payment, purchase rare coins and bullion, and access jewelry repair services. The business emphasizes personalized customer service, providing expert guidance to those unfamiliar with precious metals pricing and market values. Payment options include cash, credit cards, and mobile payment methods, with a loyalty program for repeat customers.

Sahara Gold and Silver Buyers differentiates itself through staff expertise, transparent pricing practices, and professional treatment of clients. The company highlights competitive pricing, quick payment processing, and a commitment to fair transactions. Customer testimonials emphasize the respectful, knowledgeable approach of the ownership team and staff, with several reviews noting above-market valuations and personalized service including assistance beyond the transaction itself.

However, the company faces credibility challenges. One prominent customer review alleges significantly below-market pricing (claiming offers of less than 60% of bullion price) and suggests positive reviews may come from family and friends. This creates a trust assessment problem: while multiple positive reviews praise fair pricing and honest dealing, the serious allegation of deceptive practices cannot be dismissed without independent verification. Consumers should independently verify bullion spot prices and obtain multiple quotes before selling precious metals to any buyer.
address: 1300 E Sahara Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89104

company_info.headquarters: 1300 E Sahara Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89104

pros: Family-owned business with father-son leadership and years of industry experience
Offers immediate cash payment on-site for sold items without lengthy processing delays
Accepts multiple payment methods including cash, credit cards, and mobile payments
Provides jewelry repair services in addition to buying and selling
Clean, well-organized, professionally lit store environment conducive to comfortable browsing
Staff described as knowledgeable about precious metals markets and able to provide expert guidance
Loyalty program offering exclusive deals and discounts for repeat customers
cons: One customer review alleges pricing significantly below bullion market rates (less than 60% of spot price), raising serious fairness concerns
Lack of independent verification of pricing claims—positive reviews may be from family/friends per critic allegation
No transparent pricing methodology disclosed on website to help customers verify fair value before selling
Limited information about jewelry repair pricing, turnaround times, or warranty terms
best_for: Individuals looking to quickly liquidate unwanted gold, silver, or jewelry for immediate cash in the Las Vegas area
Collectors and coin enthusiasts seeking to buy or sell rare coins with professional guidance
Local customers needing jewelry repair services combined with precious metals buying/selling in one location
diagnosis: Best suited for Las Vegas-area residents needing quick cash for precious metals who can independently verify spot prices before transacting. Primary caveat: credibility concerns exist due to one serious allegation of below-market pricing, so customers should obtain multiple competitive quotes and verify current bullion prices independently before selling.
services: Rare and collectible coins buying and selling
Expert pricing consultation and guidance for precious metals
Cash payment on-site for sold items
Loyalty program membership with exclusive discounts
Personalized customer service and market education
